Furuno · Navigation & Electronics

Furuno FAR-22x8 / FAR-23x8 Radar

Confirmed OEM spare parts for Furuno FAR-22x8 / FAR-23x8 series X-band and S-band marine radars — magnetrons, scanner units, and processor parts. Source: Furuno Installation Manual IME36520B.

Parts catalog
How to use this list: Part numbers match OEM service manuals. Use the request button below to ask about availability and pricing. Include the part number, quantity, and delivery port.
Part NumberDescription
FNE1201Magnetron, 12 kW X-band (FAR-2218 / FAR-2318) — FAR-22x8 / FAR-23x8
MG5436Magnetron, 25 kW X-band (FAR-2228 / FAR-2328) — FAR-22x8 / FAR-23x8
MG5223FMagnetron, 30 kW S-band (FAR-2238S / FAR-2338S) — FAR-22x8 / FAR-23x8
9M31Magnetron, 50 kW X-band (FAR-2258)
MG5240FMagnetron, 60 kW S-band (FAR-2268DS)
RTR-105Transceiver Unit, 12 kW X-band (FAR-2218/2318) — FAR-22x8 / FAR-23x8
RTR-106Transceiver Unit, 25 kW X-band (FAR-2228/2328) — FAR-22x8 / FAR-23x8
RTR-107Transceiver Unit, 30 kW S-band (FAR-2238S/2338S) — FAR-22x8 / FAR-23x8
RTR-108Transceiver Unit, 25 kW X-band wide (FAR-2328W) — FAR-22x8 / FAR-23x8
RTR-109Transceiver Unit, 30 kW S-band wide (FAR-2338SW) — FAR-22x8 / FAR-23x8
RTR-111Transceiver Unit, 250 W S-band solid state (FAR-2238S-NXT) — FAR-22x8 / FAR-23x8
RTR-122Transceiver Unit, 50 kW X-band (FAR-2258)
RTR-123Transceiver Unit, 600 W X-band solid state (FAR-2228-NXT) — FAR-22x8 / FAR-23x8
RTR-129Transceiver Unit, 60 kW S-band (FAR-2268DS)
XN12CFAntenna Array, X-band 4 ft (1.2 m) — FAR-22x8 / FAR-23x8
XN20CFAntenna Array, X-band 6.5 ft (2 m) — FAR-22x8 / FAR-23x8
XN24CFAntenna Array, X-band 8 ft (2.4 m) — FAR-22x8 / FAR-23x8
SN24CFAntenna Array, S-band 8 ft (2.4 m) — FAR-22x8 / FAR-23x8
SN30CFAntenna Array, S-band 10 ft (3 m) — FAR-22x8 / FAR-23x8
SN36CFAntenna Array, S-band 12 ft (3.6 m) — FAR-22x8 / FAR-23x8
RPU-025Processor Unit — FAR-22x8 / FAR-23x8
RCU-014Control Unit (standard trackball) — FAR-22x8 / FAR-23x8
RCU-015Control Unit (optional trackball) — FAR-22x8 / FAR-23x8
RCU-016Control Unit (optional trackball, no power button) — FAR-22x8 / FAR-23x8
MU-190Monitor Unit 19" (CAT 2) — FAR-22x8 / FAR-23x8
MU-231Monitor Unit 23.1" (CAT 1 / CAT 2) — FAR-22x8 / FAR-23x8
MU-270WMonitor Unit 27" wide (CAT 1 / CAT 2) — FAR-22x8 / FAR-23x8
HUB-100Network Hub (2 radars, basic) — FAR-22x8 / FAR-23x8
HUB-3000Network Hub (3+ radars / ECDIS) — FAR-22x8 / FAR-23x8
